name: DB Schema Designer
description: Designs the database schema. If it cannot determine the user-role enum structure independently, it HANDOFFs to the auth-module lane (which owns that contract). This is the HANDOFF demonstration.

checks.pass: ✅ Existing Prisma schema found — will extend it
checks.fail: ⚠️  No Prisma schema yet — will design from scratch
❌ No ORM config found — database tooling not yet decided

checks.prompt: Design the core database schema tables: users, sessions, audit_log, and one business entity table. For each table list columns with types. Note: role column must match the Role enum from the auth module. Context: {retryContext}
